# spatialMixerDefinitionForDistance

**Instance Property**

An object that combines spatial audio layers.

## Declaration

```swift
var spatialMixerDefinitionForDistance: PHASESpatialMixerDefinition? { get }
```

## Discussion

The framework sets this property to the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEBlendNodeDefinition/init(spatialMixerDefinition:)] argument.

## Accessing Blend Properties

- **blendParameterDefinition**: The meta parameter definition that caps the blend range.
